schema.description: Access Zillow real estate data including property valuations, details, comparables, and search functionality.

tools.name: get_zestimate
tools.description: Retrieve the Zestimate home valuation and value range for a specific property address.

address.description: The street address of the property (e.g., '123 Main St').

city_state_zip.description: The city, state, and ZIP code of the property (e.g., 'Seattle, WA 98101').

zestimate.description: The estimated market value of the property in USD.

value_range_low.description: The lower bound of the estimated value range in USD.

value_range_high.description: The upper bound of the estimated value range in USD.

last_updated.description: The date when the Zestimate was last updated (ISO 8601 format).

tools.name: get_property_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive details about a property including physical characteristics and location information.

address.description: The street address of the property (e.g., '123 Main St').

city_state_zip.description: The city, state, and ZIP code of the property (e.g., 'Seattle, WA 98101').

zpid.description: The unique Zillow Property ID for this property.

street.description: The street address of the property.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

state.description: The state where the property is located.

zipcode.description: The ZIP code of the property.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the property (may include half baths as decimals).

sqft.description: The total living area of the property in square feet.

lot_size.description: The lot size of the property in square feet.

year_built.description: The year the property was originally constructed.

tools.name: get_comparables
tools.description: Retrieve a list of comparable properties for a given property to assist with market analysis.

zpid.description: The unique Zillow Property ID for which to find comparable properties.

count.description: The number of comparable properties to return (maximum 25, defaults to 5).

comparables.description: A list of comparable properties with basic details.

zpid.description: The unique Zillow Property ID for this comparable property.

address.description: The full address of the comparable property.

price.description: The listed or estimated price of the comparable property in USD.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the comparable property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the comparable property (may include half baths as decimals).

tools.name: search_properties
tools.description: Search for properties in a specific location with optional price range filters.

city.description: The city name to search for properties (e.g., 'Seattle').

min_price.description: The minimum price filter in USD (optional).

max_price.description: The maximum price filter in USD (optional).

results.description: A list of properties matching the search criteria.

zpid.description: The unique Zillow Property ID for this property.

address.description: The full address of the property.

price.description: The listed or estimated price of the property in USD.

total_count.description: The total number of properties found matching the search criteria.

scenarios.description: Single property with basic data, no comparables
Multiple properties with varied attributes and some comparables
Diverse property portfolio with full comparables network
